thinking.text:
The user is saying they want to take their business elsewhere because they can't confirm whether the Gold Rewards Card (which requires a Rho-Bank+ subscription) will fit within their $100 annual budget. They don't know the cost of the Rho-Bank+ subscription, and I couldn't find it in the knowledge base either.

Before they leave, I should:
1. Acknowledge their decision
2. Maybe offer to transfer them to a human agent who might be able to provide more information about the Rho-Bank+ subscription cost
3. Or let them know they're welcome to come back if they change their mind

Actually, I should consider whether there's anything else I can do. The user seems frustrated that I couldn't find the subscription cost. A human agent might be able to provide that information and help them make an informed decision. I should offer to transfer them to a human agent who could potentially answer this question before they leave entirely.

Let me offer to transfer them to a human agent who might be able to provide the Rho-Bank+ subscription cost information, so they can make a fully informed decision.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
I completely understand your frustration! It's a reasonable concern—if you can't confirm the total cost will stay within your $100 budget, it makes sense to explore other options.

Before you go, I'd offer one thought: **a human agent may be able to provide the Rho-Bank+ subscription cost** that I wasn't able to find in our knowledge base. With that information, you'd be able to make a fully informed decision about whether the Gold Rewards Card still fits your budget.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent who can look into that for you? If not, I completely understand, and I appreciate your time. Best of luck finding the right card for your needs!
